utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five items appear explicitly. Each one includes detailed information consistent with what should be covered: (1) health_coverage specifies physical and mental health coverage plus details of deductible and benefits, (2) property_coverage describes home/contents coverage items and protections, (3) travel_coverage includes multiple travel insurance features, (4) additional_services lists enhancement and wellness programs with specifics, and (5) total_budget provides a complete monthly cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are present and fully specified with details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a 'Consolidated Premium Insurance Package' that combines health (physical + mental), property, and travel coverage. The description shows adventure sports coverage, preventive care, telemedicine, 24/7 emergency support, global and family coverage—all features that align closely with LifeFirst (health), LifeFirst (property), and InsurePlus (travel). These plans have the highest ratings for their respective categories (9 for LifeFirst health, 9 for LifeFirst property, and 10 for InsurePlus travel). The assistant also included Telemedicine and Wellness Programs in additional services. Telemedicine Services have a rating of 8, while Wellness Programs have a rating of 3 according to the ground truth. Therefore, the consolidated plan corresponds to the following ratings.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "Consolidated Premium Insurance Package (includes physical and mental health coverage, stress management, gym reimbursement, preventive care, family therapy, psychiatry services, telemedicine, adventure sports coverage, emergency support 24/7, global coverage, family coverage, deductible 5%)",
    "property_coverage": "Consolidated Premium Insurance Package (includes electronics coverage, temporary accommodation, liability protection, natural disaster coverage, luxury items covered)",
    "travel_coverage": "Consolidated Premium Insurance Package (includes medical evacuation, business travel protection, trip cancellation, baggage protection, adventure sports covered, emergency coordination, global coverage)",
    "additional_services": "Wellness programs included (gym reimbursement, preventive care, stress management programs), Telemedicine included, 24/7 Emergency Support, Global Coverage for health and travel, Family Coverage included",
